description_long: This is an old, heavily weathered red sedan with significant signs of decay and abandonment. The body is rusted and covered in grime, with missing windows and a hollowed-out engine bay at the front. The wheels are either missing or severely damaged, with only remnants of the original tires and rims visible. The interior is exposed, showing a stripped cabin devoid of seats and other fittings. The paint is faded and chipped, with patches of bare metal and rust visible throughout. This vehicle appears to have been left unused for a long time, making it a derelict shell of its former self.
description: A rusted, abandoned red sedan with missing windows, wheels, and a gutted interior, showing extensive weathering and decay.
description_view_0: Front view showing the empty engine bay, missing headlights, and a rusted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing missing front wheel, damaged rear wheel, and stripped interior through open windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a rusted trunk, missing rear lights, and no visible license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view with similar damage as the left, showing the hollowed engine bay and missing wheels.
attribute_wheel_design: Wheels are mostly missing or damaged; only partial rims and remnants of tires are visible.
